en: In the days when the judges ruled there was a famine in the land, and a man of Bethlehem in Judah went to sojourn in the country of Moab, he and his wife and his two sons.
zh: 在士師統治期間，國內發生了饑荒。有一個人帶著妻子和兩個兒子，從猶大的伯利恆前往摩押地去，寄居在那裡。

en: The name of the man was Elimelech and the name of his wife Naomi, and the names of his two sons were Mahlon and Chilion. They were Ephrathites from Bethlehem in Judah. They went into the country of Moab and remained there.
zh: 這個人名叫以利米勒，妻子名叫拿俄米，兩個兒子叫瑪倫和基連，都是猶大伯利恆的以法他人。他們到了摩押地，就在那裡住下來了。

en: But Elimelech, the husband of Naomi, died, and she was left with her two sons.
zh: 後來拿俄米的丈夫以利米勒去世了，留下她和兩個兒子。

en: These took Moabite wives; the name of the one was Orpah and the name of the other Ruth. They lived there about ten years,
zh: 他們娶了摩押女子作妻子，一個名叫俄耳巴，一個名叫路得。他們在那裡住了約有十年。

en: and both Mahlon and Chilion died, so that the woman was left without her two sons and her husband.
zh: 後來，瑪倫和基連二人也死了，留下拿俄米，既沒有了兩個兒子，又沒有了丈夫。

en: Then she arose with her daughters-in-law to return from the country of Moab, for she had heard in the fields of Moab that the LORD had visited his people and given them food.
zh: 拿俄米還在摩押地的時候，因為聽說耶和華眷顧他的子民，賜糧食給他們，就帶著兩個媳婦動身從摩押地回來。

en: So she set out from the place where she was with her two daughters-in-law, and they went on the way to return to the land of Judah.
zh: 她離開居住的地方，兩個媳婦也隨她出發，要回到猶大地去。

en: But Naomi said to her two daughters-in-law, "Go, return each of you to her mother's house. May the LORD deal kindly with you, as you have dealt with the dead and with me.
zh: 拿俄米對兩個媳婦說：“去吧，你們還是各自回娘家吧。願耶和華恩待你們，像你們善待已死的人和我一樣。

en: The LORD grant that you may find rest, each of you in the house of her husband!" Then she kissed them, and they lifted up their voices and wept.
zh: 願耶和華使你們各人有機會再嫁 ，找到歸宿。”跟著親吻她們，她們就發聲大哭，

en: And they said to her, "No, we will return with you to your people."
zh: 說：“不，我們一定要跟你一起回到你同胞那裡去。”

en: But Naomi said, "Turn back, my daughters; why will you go with me? Have I yet sons in my womb that they may become your husbands?
zh: 拿俄米說：“我女兒啊，你們回去吧，為甚麼要跟我去呢？我肚子裡還有兒子作你們的丈夫嗎？

en: Turn back, my daughters; go your way, for I am too old to have a husband. If I should say I have hope, even if I should have a husband this night and should bear sons,
zh: 走吧，我女兒啊，你們回去吧，因為我太老，不能嫁人了，就算我說我還有希望今天晚上有個丈夫，又生兒子，

en: would you therefore wait till they were grown? Would you therefore refrain from marrying? No, my daughters, for it is exceedingly bitter to me for your sake that the hand of the LORD has gone out against me."
zh: 你們可以等到他們長大嗎？你們可以為他們守節而不嫁人嗎？不行，我女兒啊，我為你們非常難過，因為耶和華伸手對付我。”

en: Then they lifted up their voices and wept again. And Orpah kissed her mother-in-law, but Ruth clung to her.
zh: 她們又放聲大哭。俄耳巴就和婆婆吻別，路得卻捨不得離開拿俄米。

en: And she said, "See, your sister-in-law has gone back to her people and to her gods; return after your sister-in-law."
zh: 拿俄米說：“你看，你嫂嫂已經回到她同胞和她的神那裡去了。你也跟著嫂嫂回去吧。”

en: But Ruth said, "Do not urge me to leave you or to return from following you. For where you go I will go, and where you lodge I will lodge. Your people shall be my people, and your God my God.
zh: 路得說：“請不要逼我離開你回去，不跟從你。你到哪裡去，我也要到哪裡去；你在哪裡過夜，我也要在哪裡過夜；你的同胞就是我的同胞，你的 神就是我的 神；

en: Where you die I will die, and there will I be buried. May the LORD do so to me and more also if anything but death parts me from you."
zh: 你死在哪裡，我也要死在哪裡，葬在哪裡。除非死亡把你我分離；如果我離開你，願耶和華加倍懲罰我。”

en: And when Naomi saw that she was determined to go with her, she said no more.
zh: 拿俄米看路得堅決要跟她走，就不再多費唇舌了。

en: So the two of them went on until they came to Bethlehem. And when they came to Bethlehem, the whole town was stirred because of them. And the women said, "Is this Naomi?"
zh: 她們雙雙上路，來到伯利恆。她們到達的時候，全城都因她們的緣故騷動起來。婦女們說：“這是拿俄米嗎？”

en: She said to them, "Do not call me Naomi; call me Mara, for the Almighty has dealt very bitterly with me.
zh: 拿俄米對她們說：“不要叫我拿俄米，叫我瑪拉吧，因為全能者使我吃盡了苦頭。

en: I went away full, and the LORD has brought me back empty. Why call me Naomi, when the LORD has testified against me and the Almighty has brought calamity upon me?"
zh: 我滿滿地出去，耶和華卻使我空空地回來，你們為甚麼還叫我拿俄米呢？耶和華折磨我，全能者加害於我。”

en: So Naomi returned, and Ruth the Moabite her daughter-in-law with her, who returned from the country of Moab. And they came to Bethlehem at the beginning of barley harvest.
zh: 拿俄米就這樣回來了。她媳婦摩押女子路得隨著她從摩押地回來。她們到達伯利恆，正是開始收割大麥的時候。
